data.title: Fitts's Law
data.description: Design principle ensuring that elements are sized and positioned to enhance user interaction efficiency.

data.title: Hick’s Law
data.description: Simplifying user choices to streamline decision-making and reduce time to convert.

data.title: Aesthetic-Usability Effect
data.description: Elements are designed to be visually appealing to enhance usability perceptions.

data.title: Jakob's Law
data.description: Aligns user interfaces with common web standards to meet user expectations.

data.title: Pareto Principle
data.description: Focuses on features that provide the most benefit or value to users.
